title: hymenophyllum macrothecum
intro: Hymenophyllum macrothecum, also known as the macrothecum fern or tooth fern, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. It is native to Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum macrothecum include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of a tea or infusion, and it can also be dried and used in tinctures or capsules.
